classes.label: Contact Information
classes.description: Information used to contact an entity, including addresses, phone numbers, and electronic contact details.
evidence: Main fields: 邮政编码、通信地址、电话、移动电话、传真电话、电子信箱、网络地址、即时通讯号

classes.label: Temporal Concept
classes.description: Concepts related to time, including specific dates, years, and time formats.
evidence: Main fields: 年度（年份、年）、年月、日期、时间

classes.label: Organizational Unit
classes.description: A unit or organization within an educational or administrative context.
evidence: Main fields: 单位号、单位名称、单位地址、隶属单位号、单位负责人号

datatype_properties.label: has postal code
datatype_properties.description: The postal code for the contact address.
evidence: JCTB010101 邮政编码

datatype_properties.label: has mailing address
datatype_properties.description: The detailed mailing address including province, city, county, town, street, and house number.
evidence: JCTB010102 通信地址 指包括省（自治区、直辖市） /地（市、州）/县（区、旗） /乡（镇）/街（村）/门牌 号的详细地址

datatype_properties.label: has phone number
datatype_properties.description: The telephone number.
evidence: JCTB010103 电话 即电话号码

datatype_properties.label: has mobile number
datatype_properties.description: The mobile phone number.
evidence: JCTB010104 移动电话

datatype_properties.label: has fax number
datatype_properties.description: The fax telephone number.
evidence: JCTB010105 传真电话

datatype_properties.label: has email address
datatype_properties.description: The email address.
evidence: JCTB010106 电子信箱 电子邮件地址

datatype_properties.label: has web address
datatype_properties.description: The network address such as homepage, blog, or microblog URL.
evidence: JCTB010107 网络地址 如主页、博客、微博网址

datatype_properties.label: has instant messaging id
datatype_properties.description: The instant messaging number such as MSN/QQ.
evidence: JCTB010108 即时通讯号 如MSN/QQ等号码

datatype_properties.label: has year
datatype_properties.description: The year in format YYYY.
evidence: JCTB010201 年度（年份、年） 格式：YYYY，如：2008

datatype_properties.label: has year month
datatype_properties.description: The year and month in format YYYYMM.
evidence: JCTB010202 年月 格式：YYYYMM，如： 200604表示2006年4 月

datatype_properties.label: has date
datatype_properties.description: The date in format YYYYMMDD.
evidence: JCTB010203 日期 格式：YYYYMMDD，如： 20060412表示2006 年4月12日

datatype_properties.label: has time
datatype_properties.description: The time in format hhmmss.
evidence: JCTB010204 时间 格式：hhmmss，如： 141503表示下午2时 15分3秒

datatype_properties.label: has school year
datatype_properties.description: The school year in format YYYY-YYYY.
evidence: JCTB010205 学年（度） 格式：YYYY-YYYY，如： 2001-2002

datatype_properties.label: has semester code
datatype_properties.description: The code representing the semester.
evidence: JCTB010206 学期码

datatype_properties.label: has validity period
datatype_properties.description: The validity period in format YYYYMMDD-YYYYMMDD.
evidence: JCTB010207 有效期 格式： YYYYMMDD-YYYYMMDD

datatype_properties.label: has unit number
datatype_properties.description: The code for the organizational unit.
evidence: JCTB010301 单位号 自行编码

datatype_properties.label: has unit name
datatype_properties.description: The name of the organizational unit.
evidence: JCTB010302 单位名称

datatype_properties.label: has unit english name
datatype_properties.description: The English name of the organizational unit.
evidence: JCTB010303 单位英文名称

datatype_properties.label: has unit abbreviation
datatype_properties.description: The abbreviation of the organizational unit.
evidence: JCTB010304 单位简称

datatype_properties.label: has unit english abbreviation
datatype_properties.description: The English abbreviation of the organizational unit.
evidence: JCTB010305 单位英文简称

datatype_properties.label: has unit pinyin abbreviation
datatype_properties.description: The pinyin abbreviation of the organizational unit.
evidence: JCTB010306 单位简拼

datatype_properties.label: has unit address
datatype_properties.description: The address of the organizational unit.
evidence: JCTB010307 单位地址

datatype_properties.label: has subordinate unit number
datatype_properties.description: The number of the subordinate unit.
evidence: JCTB010308 隶属单位号

datatype_properties.label: has unit category code
datatype_properties.description: The category code of the organizational unit.
evidence: JCTB010309 单位类别码

datatype_properties.label: has unit management code
datatype_properties.description: The management code of the organizational unit.
evidence: JCTB010310 单位办别码

datatype_properties.label: has unit validity flag
datatype_properties.description: Flag indicating if the unit is valid (1) or invalid (0).
evidence: JCTB010311 单位有效标识 1 是 (有效) 0 否 (失效)

datatype_properties.label: has invalidation date
datatype_properties.description: The date when the unit became invalid.
evidence: JCTB010312 失效日期 指单位失效日期

datatype_properties.label: is physical entity
datatype_properties.description: Flag indicating if the unit is a physical entity (1) or virtual (0).
evidence: JCTB010313 是否实体 1 是 0 否（即虚体）

datatype_properties.label: has establishment date
datatype_properties.description: The year and month when the unit was established.
evidence: JCTB010314 建立年月 格式：YYYYMM 指单位最初建立的年月

datatype_properties.label: has unit head id
datatype_properties.description: The employee ID of the unit head.
evidence: JCTB010315 单位负责人号 单位负责人工号
